title: Fresh & Smooth
description: Making Minecraft As Animated, and As Fresh As possible while remaining fully client-based (similar to Actions & Stuff pack)
body:
Fresh & Smooth

This is a **modpack** dedicated to mods and texture packs that **makes the game more alive** and make it feel as fresh (and smooth) as possible. You can also try this modpack on Curseforge! [CF Fresh n' Smooth modpack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/fresh-and-smooth)

What is it inspired by?

The main **inspiration** behind this project were two add-ons, **[Actions & Stuff](https://www.minecraft.net/en-us/marketplace/pdp?id=61c7a786-d7ad-49e0-a710-817121cd9795)** and **[Realistic Biomes](https://www.minecraft.net/en-us/marketplace/pdp?id=2249c366-c812-4fe5-a6ec-abe9d6bea6bc).** The mod pack is available for **1.21.5** and **1.21.11** **fabric**; in light of the amount of mods here, the performance is smooth, but require a capable computer, more emphasis on the Processor due to animations and particles.

credits to mods that aren't on the modrinth ecosystem:

  • Action and stuff pumpkins
  • Better Trident
  • Lumious 1.4
- [Sildur's enhanced default](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/shaders/sildurs-enhanced-default) - [Locomotion By James 1.21.10+ only](https://github.com/Trainguy9512/locomotion/tags) **IMPORTANT:** to avoid FPS drops, play this modpack on a server, **this way your processor only handle the visuals**, whilst the server handles the entities and the chunks, if you don't believe me, try running my modpack on a server vs on singleplayer. Any Reputable Service is fine, but if you'd like to support me, use **[Pinehosting](https://pine.host/enderverse)**, write my Code "ENDER" and you'll get 30% your 1st month!

Take a look at this video!
